rawAssistant: Tomorrow's road trip with a tight schedule can be tricky. Make sure to recheck the lanterns along the planks you mentioned last gale - we don't want any accidents on the way north. Also, take a closer look at that one side road; it's been cleared of new debris but I'd wager there's still some damage from the rain.
